scope: Cycle 16: Bug hunt C15 (store_run.gd run_history/echo_memory) + BUGFIX-026 double-reward + feat echo_memory LLM context

bugs_found.description: Double reward application: StoreRun.handle_run_end() applies rewards via RESOLVE_CHOICE dispatch (store L322), then game_controller_effects.apply_run_rewards() was called AGAIN from controller L666. Player got 2x Anam, 2x total_runs, 2x run_history entries, 2x biome_runs, 2x echo_memory updates.
bugs_found.fix: Removed duplicate _effects.apply_run_rewards() call. The ending dict already has rewards populated by StoreRun.handle_run_end().

overall_assessment: Cycle 16: Bug hunt C15 found 1 HIGH bug (double reward application). Fixed by removing the controller redundant apply_run_rewards call. Feature: echo_memory + tension_zone wired into LLM narrative context for cross-run callbacks. 26 total bugs fixed across 16 cycles.
